theme.title: Mixed / Stock-Picker's Market
theme.summary: Energy (+1.09%) and Industrials (+0.22%) led the market today, while Communication Svcs (-1.21%) and Financials (-0.85%) brought up the rear. Performance didn't cluster cleanly by style — growth averaged -0.88%, defensives -0.46%, and value/cyclicals +0.01% — more a stock-by-stock market than a single broad theme. Major indices moved in a tighter band — S&P 500 -1.01%, Dow -0.77%, Nasdaq -1.40% — without one clearly dominating. Small caps bucked the broader trend, with the Russell 2000 up -0.42%, outperforming large caps. The VIX rose 12.33% to 18.77, pointing to a bit more caution creeping in beneath the surface. Gold added 0.68% to $4,023.00, crude oil was little changed at $81.77, and bitcoin gained 0.29% — cross-asset moves weren't all pointing the same direction as equities.
